---
title: "Thomas Davis"
---

## Thomas Davis

**Dates:** (b.1847/8)

### Description

police constable

### Biography

He was living in Otterbourne at the time of the 1891 census, but CMY stated in 1895 that his successor was named Kemp.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 29th [1896]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
